svg.title: Who is the bigger security threat?
svg.desc: Split dark panel poster. Left: a calm ransomware operator holding a single key. Right: a chaotic vibe coder surrounded by broken locks and leaked credentials. Bottom: The real threat to your system might be you.
svg.text: 12 / 12 ransomware operators trust humans for the real work.
Every new tool = new attack topology
The real threat to your system might be you.
